beats.text: If you had to remember one thing from today, what would it be?
What's the one thing to remember?
options: Different pictures can have the same equation

validator.description: Student selected option A: equals sign meaning

beats.text: Same value as—that's the equals sign's job. You'll use that in every equation from now on.

validator.description: Student selected option B: unknown position flexibility

beats.text: Unknowns move, but the relationship stays. You can figure out any missing piece.

condition.selected: Different pictures can have the same equation

validator.description: Student selected option C: structural variety

beats.text: Rows, stacks, groups—different pictures, same math underneath.
